tasks.title: Build "deny test" workflow
tasks.spec:
Outcome: A simple workflow with a Manual Trigger and a single Set node named "deny test".

Trigger mode: Manual trigger (n8n-nodes-base.manualTrigger). The workflow is started by clicking "Execute workflow" in the editor.

External systems: None.

Required effects: The Set node named "deny test" runs after the manual trigger fires. It should set at least one field (e.g. a field named "result" with a static string value like "deny test passed") to demonstrate the node is functional.

Required branches: No branching required. Single linear path: Manual Trigger → Set node.

Required data: No dynamic data required. The Set node can use a hardcoded static value.

Explicit constraints:
- The Set node must be named exactly "deny test".
- No other nodes beyond the Manual Trigger and the "deny test" Set node.

Empty/invalid behavior: Not applicable — manual trigger with static data.

Done when: The workflow exists with a Manual Trigger connected to a Set node named "deny test", and a test run completes successfully with the Set node outputting the configured field.

planningContext.summary: Build a simple workflow with a Manual Trigger and a Set node named "deny test", then run it to verify it works.

suspendPayload.message: Review the plan (1 task) before execution starts.
